document_name: Official Los Angeles City Open Data - Demographics & Transportation
description: Raw datasets from the Los Angeles city data portals covering population demographics, housing characteristics, and transportation/mobility metrics to inform urban-scale world design
recency_requirement: Most recent census data and annual updates (past 2-3 years)
steps_to_find: Visit Los Angeles Open Data portal; search datasets related to demographics, housing, and mobility
Cross-check with US Census Bureau data (ACS) for consistency
Extract fields on population, density, age distribution, housing types, commute patterns

document_name: Official Detroit City Open Data - Demographics & Transportation
description: Raw datasets from Detroit's open data portals covering population, housing, transportation, and urban activity indicators
recency_requirement: Most recent census data and annual refreshes (past 2-3 years)
steps_to_find: Access Detroit Open Data portals; identify datasets on demographics and mobility
Corroborate with national census data and local planning documents
Extract relevant indicators for density, land use, and transit usage

document_name: Official Miami City Open Data - Demographics & Transportation
description: Raw datasets from Miami's open data portals covering population metrics, housing patterns, and transportation statistics to inform seaside-urban morphologies
recency_requirement: Most recent data within past 2-3 years
steps_to_find: Access Miami Open Data portals; locate datasets on demographics, housing, and mobility
Cross-reference with state and national data sources for validation
Extract key indicators for density, population distribution, and transit access

document_name: Existing City Zoning Regulations – Los Angeles, Detroit, and Miami
description: Current zoning and land-use regulations for the three target cities to inform density caps, districting, and development constraints in the game world
recency_requirement: Most recent edition/updates for each city
steps_to_find: Search each city’s planning portal for zoning codes and amendments
Extract key provisions on density limits, building heights, land-use categories, and parking requirements
Note any recent changes affecting urban form

document_name: GDPR Text & CCPA Compliance Guidance for Gaming
description: Primary and secondary text of GDPR and CCPA with guidance applicable to data collection, telemetry, analytics, and user data handling in a game development context
recency_requirement: Current as of latest official texts and guidance (within last 2-3 years)
steps_to_find: Retrieve GDPR text from eur-lex or official EU bodies
Retrieve CCPA text and official guidance from California AG or regulator portals
Identify game-specific interpretations and guidelines from data protection authorities

document_name: IEEE Ethically Aligned Design Guidelines for AI in Creative Content
description: IEEE’s ethical AI guidelines addressing fairness, bias, transparency, and societal impact as it relates to AI-generated content in games
recency_requirement: Latest available edition or formal guidance
steps_to_find: Obtain IEEE Ethically Aligned Design publication
Review sections on bias, fairness, transparency, and governance
Map guidelines to AI-driven procedural content workflows in the game
